motionsites.note: MotionSites is a hero-prompt generator app, not a landing page template. Extracted tokens reflect the app UI, not the generated 'bloom-ai-hero' output. App uses system font stack.

typography.heading_family: system-ui (-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica Neue, Arial)
typography.note: Uses system fonts — not relevant for keyboard-site which requires Google Fonts

glass.note: No backdrop-filter found in HTML scrape

notable_patterns: Dark UI (#171717) with green accent (#193A25) — forest/nature dark palette
Radius 12px — consistent rounded corners throughout
App-style layout, not landing page — treat as UI inspiration only
Green dark accent is unique in the ref set — useful as alternative to orange if keyboard project needs variation

synthesis.spline_search_verdict: No Spline URLs found in any of the 4 references. Searched full HTML of bima, voidai, landeros for prod.spline.design, .splinecode, and spline-viewer elements. All returned zero matches. Landeros specifically had NO Spline whatsoever.
synthesis.animation_notes: All Framer-built refs use Framer Motion internally. For the React 19 + Vite stack, Framer Motion is the correct equivalent. No GSAP, Three.js, or Lenis detected across any ref.

glass_css_recommended.source_ref: voidai (most aggressive blur detected, pure dark bg)
glass_css_recommended.notes: For keyboard-site dark theme (#000000 base), use this glass on: navbar, floating cards, spec overlay. The inner top border (box-shadow inset) simulates light catching the glass edge — pattern from premium dark UI.

button_shadow_recommended.notes: Adapted for keyboard-site orange accent. Inner white shimmer + colored outer ring = premium CTA feel.

synthesis.accent_notes: Existing keyboard-site token. None of the refs use orange — this differentiates the keyboard project. Keep it.

recommended_fonts.notes: Clean geometric sans. Good for tech/product headings.
Technical but warm. Pairs well with JetBrains Mono.
Ideal for keyboard specs: keycap legends, switch specs, actuation force values. Adds authenticity.
Premium rounded sans. Very distinct from Inter. Strong brand differentiation for headings.

typography_recommendation.heading: Inter (existing) OR Satoshi (upgrade path)
typography_recommendation.mono_accent: JetBrains Mono (add for spec labels, keycap text, technical details)

key_sections_detected: hero — full-bleed dark with large display type + single CTA
solutions/features — card grid with service descriptions
case-studies — portfolio with numbered items + category tags
stats-bar — large number callouts (projects, clients, revenue)
testimonials — quote cards or twitter-style reviews
pricing — tiered cards with toggle monthly/yearly
keyboard_site_specific_sections: hero — keyboard 3D/R3F canvas + headline + pre-order CTA
product-specs — JetBrains Mono labels, actuation force, switch type
features — card grid (hot-swap, aluminum, gasket mount, etc.)

dark_palette_reference.notes: Synthesized from bima (#000319) and voidai (#01010D) dark patterns. Pure black is more premium for hardware product.

motion_tokens.notes: Emil Kowalski easing pattern — fast out, smooth deceleration. Use for all entrance animations.
